features: 🦷Kills bacteria: Wisdom 500ml Fresh Effect Total Care Mouthwash contains antibacterial agents that help to kill the bacteria in your mouth, reducing the risk of tooth decay, gum disease, and bad breath.
🦷Freshens breath: The mint flavor in Wisdom 500ml Fresh Effect Total Care Mouthwash leaves your breath feeling fresh and clean for hours, helping to combat bad breath.
🦷Whitens teeth: This mouthwash contains whitening agents that help to remove surface stains from your teeth, giving you a brighter, whiter smile.
🦷Strengthens tooth enamel: Wisdom 500ml Fresh Effect Total Care Mouthwash contains fluoride, which helps to strengthen your tooth enamel and protect your teeth against decay.
🦷Prevents gum disease: By killing bacteria and reducing plaque buildup, Wisdom 500ml Fresh Effect Total Care Mouthwash can help to prevent gum disease, which can lead to tooth loss if left untreated.
description: Product Description Wisdom fresh effect total care 6-in-1 antibacterial mouthwash 500ml Wisdom Fresh effect total care mouthwash provides 6 oral health benefits in 1 to help keep your teeth and gums healthy. The antibacterial formulation gets into even hard to reach areas for a truly deep cleaning experience. Fresh mint flavour for total mouth freshness. It is formulated with enamel strengthening fluoride that gets into hard to reach areas and protects your teeth and gums. Ingredients Aqua, alcohol, sorbitol, polysorbate 20, aroma, allantoin, cetylpyridinium chloride, sodium fluoride 0.05 percent (225ppm f), sodium saccharin, sodium benzoate, menthol, zinc chloride, ci 42051, ci 16035. Directions Pour the recommended amount of mouthwash into the cap provided. This will typically be around 20ml, but check the label for the specific instructions. Rinse your mouth with the mouthwash for 30 seconds to 1 minute. Make sure you swish it around your mouth, covering all areas including your teeth, gums, and tongue. Spit the mouthwash out into the sink. Do not eat, drink, or rinse your mouth with water for at least 30 minutes after using the mouthwash. Safety Warning Keep out of reach of children. This product contains high concentrations of active ingredients that can be harmful if ingested. Box Contains 1 x Wisdom Fresh Effect Total Care Mouthwash 500 ml See more
